summary: Aplikasi kasir bengkel berbasis web dengan penyimpanan internal. Fitur: pengaturan toko (logo, nama, alamat, telepon, ucapan terima kasih), kasir/transaksi, cetak struk menggunakan window.print() (kompatibel Nativefier/Node.js), riwayat transaksi, manajemen stok suku cadang, dan laporan harian/bulanan.
architectural_notes: Gunakan window.print() untuk cetak struk, kompatibel dengan Nativefier (wrapper Node.js)
Penyimpanan data menggunakan localStorage atau IndexedDB (internal, tanpa database eksternal)
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Workshop/automotive themed app logo — dark navy background with an orange wrench and gear icon (bengkel-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Default shop logo placeholder — minimalist orange and dark navy shield badge with text 'BENGKEL' (default-shop-logo.dim_300x300.png)

existing_features.title: Build a Shop Settings page where the owner can upload/change the shop logo, edit the shop name, address, phone number, and the thank-you message that appears on printed receipts. Changes must be persisted to the backend.

Build a Catalog Management page to manage services and spare parts (products). Each item has a name, category (service vs. part), unit price, and stock quantity. Support add, edit, and delete operations.

Build a Cashier / New Transaction page where the cashier can search and add services or products to a cart, set quantities, view running total, apply an optional discount, record customer name and vehicle info, and finalize the transaction.

Implement a print-friendly receipt component that uses window.print() so it works with Nativefier/Node.js desktop wrapping. The receipt must display the shop logo, shop name, address, phone number, transaction date/time, transaction ID, itemized list with quantities and prices, grand total, and the configured thank-you message.
Build a Transaction History page that lists all past transactions with date, customer name, vehicle info, total amount, and a reprint button. Support filtering by date range.
Build a Reports page showing daily and monthly sales summaries: total revenue, number of transactions, and top-selling items. Include a date/month picker to navigate between periods.

Design and apply a cohesive visual theme for the entire application: a clean, professional workshop/automotive aesthetic using dark navy and orange-amber accent colors, bold industrial typography, card-based layouts, and a persistent sidebar navigation with icons for Cashier, Catalog, Transactions, Reports, and Settings.

new_feature_requests.summary: Menu pengaturan toko (logo, nama, alamat, telepon, ucapan terima kasih di struk)
Kasir/transaksi - tambah item jasa/produk, hitung total
Cetak struk menggunakan window.print() kompatibel Nativefier/Node.js

Create a backend Motoko actor to store and manage all application data: shop settings (logo URL, shop name, address, phone number, thank-you message), products/services catalog with stock, transactions with line items, and daily/monthly report aggregation.
